title: Automatic Notification for automated new item to include item name
excerpt: I created an automation to create a new item every [time period] and also a notification when the new item is created. The notification kicks off before all of the information is entered into the pulse, resulting in an i…

posts.author: EmilyRobin (Emily Rademacher)
posts.cookedHtml: I created an automation to create a new item every [time period] and also a notification when the new item is created. The notification kicks off before all of the information is entered into the pulse, resulting in an incomplete email notification - not including item name and other column information.

posts.author: Savita2024 (Savita Ubhayakar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m having the same issue. If I remove any conditions, the automation is triggered and none of the information is captured in the email. If I add the condition and then try to trigger the automation, nothing is sent. This is something to do with its constant auto-saving I think.

Is there something I’m doing wrong?
